ideation: This animation sequence depicts a gentle, welcoming gesture, suggesting the cozy and inviting feeling associated with a house with a garden. The arms move in a slow, deliberate manner, reflecting the peaceful atmosphere of a home. In frame 1, both arms are extended slightly forward and outward, palms facing upward, as if presenting or offering the house.  Frame 2 sees the arms move slightly downward, maintaining the open palms and outward extension, suggesting a welcoming embrace. Frame 3 brings the arms in slightly closer to the body, still with open palms, as if inviting someone closer. The final frame shows the arms returning to a relaxed position at the sides, maintaining the welcoming atmosphere.

frames.beat: arms open wide, presenting a welcoming home
arms extend further, offering the garden space
arms draw closer, inviting you inside
arms return to rest, the house is yours
